since_last: 85% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.52%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 85% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +1.45% · Gold +1.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.66%. 85% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.52%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.52%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.57%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.91%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.91%, HPE +9.50%, SYNA +6.74%, MU +6.08%, UPST +6.04%. Laggards: AVAV -5.16%, PLTR -2.81%, CRM -2.77%, IBM -2.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.20% at $153.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
